sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_cast (id Int32, value String);
INSERT INTO test_cast (id, value) VALUES (1, CAST('100' AS Int32));
UPDATE test_cast SET value = CAST(value AS Float64) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, CAST(value AS UInt8) AS cast_value FROM test_cast;
SELECT CAST(CAST('2023-06-12' AS Date) AS DateTime) AS datetime_value;
